race.comment: DESERT ORA (2) made it a hat-trick at Pinjarra last start, scoring by 0.8L as the equal favourite. Now out to 1400m which doesn't look an issue and she can continue to work through the grades. There's nothing to be scared of here and she can make it four wins in a row. CAPE CHURCHILL (9) ran on from midfield to just miss over 1200m on debut and showed she has the class to knock over a maiden win. The inside draw again here suits with Fiore hopping aboard and the winkers going on first time. Makes plenty of appeal. MISS DEFIES ME (8) gets CJP on board today after getting well back and closing fairly in her two runs this time in. Third-up now and getting out in trip, she can turn in an improved effort. ACQUIRED TASTE (7) is third-up now and getting out in trip looks a big tick for her chances. Wouldn't surprise to see her go to another level now. COSMIC WALTZ (6) can feature on resumption.
